name: teamId
label: Team
help: Select a team from your Renderbase account

name: workspaceId
label: Workspace
help: Select a workspace within the selected team

name: templateId
label: PDF Template
help: Select a PDF template from the selected workspace

name: variables
label: Template Variables
help: Key-value pairs for template variables. Use the variable names defined in your template.

name: fileName
label: File Name
help: Custom file name without the .pdf extension. Defaults to the template name if not provided.

name: waitForCompletion
label: Wait for Completion
help: If enabled, the module waits until the PDF is fully generated. Disable for async processing.
